title: Kernelについて、soul.mdもしくはphilosophy.mdを作るべきか？方法としてはobsidianにある情報を抽出して作成する。マルチエージェント・オーケストレーションで点数化して評価せよ
summary_text: plan=Create a single explicit refresh script in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration` that parses validated Obsidian `05_Beliefs` notes into a deterministic, filtered section and writes `/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/docs/philosophy.md` then mirrors `/Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md`, and wire it only as a manual/triggered action so write-time skills always read from `philosophy.md` only.; files=/Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md,/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/docs/philosophy.md,/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/setup.sh,/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/harness/fugue-harness-hook.sh,/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-philosophy-worldview-smoke.sh,/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-check-philosophy-worldview-smoke.sh,/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml,/Users/masayuki/Obsidian Project Kit for Market/05_Beliefs,/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/notion-meeting-intelligence/SKILL.md,/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/notion-research-documentation/SKILL.md,/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/notion-knowledge-capture/SKILL.md,/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/note-manuscript/SKILL.md;/risks=Belief note format drift and inconsistent frontmatter in Obsidian can break automated extraction, so the script needs strict schema checks plus a small dry-run/validation failure mode to prevent accidental low-quality overrides.
